EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} deleted the named pipe {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted the link {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete the named pipe {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete the file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete the link {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted the file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
